title: Linux Persistence Indicator Score (Combined Methods)
description: Calculates a persistence risk score per host by counting distinct persistence mechanism indicators (crontab, systemd, authorized_keys, shell profiles, at-jobs, sudoers). A host with multiple persistence vectors indicates thorough attacker entrenchment. Uses combined scoring (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Combined Methods - risk scoring).
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs') and 'Process Name' = 'bash' and (msg like '*crontab*' or msg like '*systemctl enable*' or msg like '*systemctl daemon-reload*' or msg like '*authorized_keys*' or msg like '*.bashrc*' or msg like '*.bash_profile*' or msg like '*.service*' or msg like '*at -f*' or msg like '*visudo*' or msg like '*/etc/sudoers*') | stats count as total_events, distinctcount(msg) as unique_mechanisms by 'Host Name' | where unique_mechanisms > 2 | sort -unique_mechanisms
